description.content: Operations for retrieving scorecard statistics
Retrieves answered scorecard data for calls, including scores and evaluations by reviewers for the specified time period and users.

response.name: Successful response containing answered scorecard data.

Operations for retrieving activity and performance statistics
Retrieves aggregated user activity statistics for a specified time period. Returns metrics such as call counts, email counts, and other activity measures grouped by user.

response.name: Successful response containing aggregated activity data.

Retrieves coaching metrics for a specified manager, workspace, and time period. Returns data about coaching activities and performance.

query.description: Filter by manager's Gong user ID.
(Required) Start date for the metrics period in ISO-8601 format.
(Required) End date for the metrics period in ISO-8601 format.

response.name: Successful response containing coaching metrics.

The Gong Stats API provides access to activity metrics including user interaction statistics, answered scorecards, talk ratios, and aggregated user activity data for performance tracking and analytics.
